import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Award, Users, Target, Heart, Dumbbell, MessageCircle, Star, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react'; const ADMIN_WHATSAPP = '919999999999'; const trainerTeam = [ { name: 'Ajeet Singh', role: 'Head Trainer & Founder', exp: '10+ years', speciality: 'Strength & Conditioning', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534438327276-14e5300c3a48?w=300&q=80' }, { name: 'Rahul Sharma', role: 'Nutrition Expert', exp: '6 years', speciality: 'Diet & Meal Planning', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593079831268-3381b0db4a77?w=300&q=80' }, { name: 'Pooja Gupta', role: 'Yoga & Flexibility', exp: '5 years', speciality: 'Flexibility & Core', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571019614242-c5c5dee9f50b?w=300&q=80' }, { name: 'Vikram Yadav', role: 'Cardio Specialist', exp: '7 years', speciality: 'Cardio & Fat Loss', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571019613454-1cb2f99b2d8b?w=300&q=80' }, ]; const values = [ { icon: '🏆', title: 'Results-Driven', desc: 'We are obsessed with helping you achieve your fitness goals.' }, { icon: '💪', title: 'Expert Training', desc: 'Certified trainers with years of real-world experience.' }, { icon: '🥗', title: 'Holistic Approach', desc: 'Combining training, nutrition and lifestyle for lasting results.' }, { icon: '❤️', title: 'Community', desc: 'A supportive community that motivates you every day.' }, ]; export default function AboutPage() { return (
{/* Hero */}
Est. 2014

ABOUT FITNESSBY AJEET

Born from a passion for fitness and a dream to make professional-grade training accessible to everyone in our community. We are more than a gym — we are your transformation partner.

{/* Story */}

OUR STORY

FitnessByAjeet was founded by Ajeet Singh, a passionate fitness enthusiast and certified personal trainer who believed that everyone deserves access to quality fitness coaching — regardless of their background.

Starting with a small setup, Ajeet built this gym from the ground up with a mission: to create a space where members don't just exercise, but truly transform. Today, FitnessByAjeet is home to 500+ active members and a team of dedicated trainers.

Our approach goes beyond lifting weights. We focus on holistic wellness — combining strength training, flexibility, nutrition, and mental health to deliver results that last a lifetime.
